hero.label: Boutique Pilates Studio
hero.sub: A sanctuary for mindful movement and holistic well-being in the heart of the city.

studio.label: Our Studio
studio.title: A Space for Mindful Movement
studio.text: Heiko Ryu is a boutique Pilates studio designed as a sanctuary for those who seek harmony between body and mind. Our intimate, carefully curated space allows for personalized attention and a truly transformative experience.

benefits.label: Why Pilates
benefits.title: Transform Body & Mind
benefits.card1_text: Build deep core stability and functional strength through precise, controlled movements.
benefits.card2_text: Improve your range of motion and stand taller with consistent Pilates practice.
benefits.card3_text: Cultivate mindfulness and reduce stress through focused breathwork and intentional movement.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Our Classes
services.mat_text: Foundation group classes on the mat. Perfect for all levels, building strength and flexibility together.
services.reformer_text: Small-group sessions on the Reformer machine for deeper, more targeted practice and faster results.
services.private_text: Fully personalized one-on-one coaching tailored to your specific goals, needs, and body.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Stories of Transformation
testimonials.q1: Heiko Ryu changed the way I think about movement. I've never felt stronger or more centered in my life.
testimonials.q2: The instructors are exceptional. Every session feels like a complete reset for my body and mind.
testimonials.q3: I started on a doctor's recommendation and stayed for the incredible community and real results.

cta.label: Start Today
cta.title: Ready to Begin Your Journey?
cta.sub: Join us for a class and discover what mindful movement can do for your body and mind.
